ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "helm_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant (Helm) */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age category of the participant (Y, J, GM) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the participant (M, F) */,
  "fleet" TEXT /* Fleet the participant is competing in */,
  "sail_no" TEXT /* Primary sail number of the boat */,
  "alt_sail_no" TEXT /* Alternative sail number of the boat (if applicable) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "club_membership_id" INTEGER /* Club membership ID of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participant (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_fleet FOREIGN KEY ("fleet") REFERENCES fleets ("fleet_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "race_location" TEXT /* Location of the race */,
  "race_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "race_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the race */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of the race (e.g., sprint, endurance) */,
  "race_distance" TEXT /* Distance of the race */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "wind_speed" TEXT /* Wind speed during the race */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the race */,
  "race_director" TEXT /* Name of the race director */,
  "race_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the participant in the race */,
  "tally" INTEGER /* Tally score of the participant */,
  "r1" REAL /* Score in the first round */,
  "r2" REAL /* Score in the second round */,
  "total" REAL /* Total score of the participant */,
  "nett" REAL /* Nett score of the participant */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the participant in the race */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the participant in the race */,
  "time_difference" TEXT /* Time difference from the leader */,
  "penalties" TEXT /* Penalties incurred by the participant */,
  "disqualified" TEXT /* Indicates if the participant was disqualified */,
  "reason_for_disqualification" TEXT /* Reason for disqualification if applicable */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleets" (
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fleet */,
  "fleet_name" TEXT /* Name of the fleet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fleet */,
  "fleet_type" TEXT /* Type of the fleet (e.g., competitive, recreational) */,
  "fleet_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants in the fleet */,
  "fleet_rules" TEXT /* Rules specific to the fleet */,
  "fleet_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the fleet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_id")
)
column_names: Age category of the participant (Y, J, GM)
Fleet the participant is competing in
Primary sail number of the boat
Alternative sail number of the boat (if applicable)
Phone number of the emergency contact
Club membership ID of the participant
Type of the race (e.g., sprint, endurance)
Any additional notes or comments about the race
Rank of the participant in the race
Start time of the participant in the race
Finish time of the participant in the race
Indicates if the participant was disqualified
Any additional comments or notes about the result
Type of the fleet (e.g., competitive, recreational)
Maximum number of participants in the fleet
Any additional notes or comments about the fleet
